backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature requirements to frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file listing brief descriptions of major frontend components and content files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining CSS variables for light/dark themes and applying global background and text styles.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry file mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component assembling all site sections, header, footer, background, and audio manager.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Component handling looping ambient and chainsaw audio with autoplay fallback, mute controls, and user prompts.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable layout wrapper providing consistent section spacing, titles, subtitles, and separators.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Footer displaying an extreme haunt warning and attribution with themed styling.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Fixed header with logo, smooth-scroll navigation, mobile menu, and scroll-based visual transitions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Renders an auditions section with dates, hours, and a list of casting roles, including badges and descriptive cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Displays an interior elevation image of Clown Town with descriptive text inside a styled card.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Shows food booth cards with images, pricing alerts, descriptions, and menu items pulled from content data.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Lists haunted house attractions with images, wait-time alert, descriptions, and optional featured scenes.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Creates the homepage hero with background imagery, logo, title text, and a button that scrolls to the auditions section.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Presents a procession preview with an image and descriptive text highlighting the 6pm event.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Provides operating hours, ticket information, and rules/warnings using multiple styled cards and alerts.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Renders a merch shops section displaying shop cards with names, items, and prices plus a note card.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Displays scare zone cards with images, names, taglines, and descriptions in a grid layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Shows a 2027 teaser section with two upcoming house previews including names, taglines, and teaser text.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Simple teaser card announcing future updates with a title and short message.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: Applies layered horror-themed background effects using gradients, noise, and scanlines.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Defines food booth data including names, taglines, descriptions, and menu items.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Maps content items to static AI‑generated image asset paths for houses, zones, and booths.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Provides haunted house data with names, taglines, descriptions, scenes, and location info.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Lists merch shop entries with names, items sold, prices, and a general note.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Contains scare zone definitions with names, taglines, and detailed descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication, including loading, login, logout, and status tracking. Wraps AuthClient creation with custom options and exposes identity state through a hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables for a black-and-neon-green horror theme, plus utility classes like radial gradients and bloody-text effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it in React Query and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering the root component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, content paths, extended color tokens tied to CSS variables, custom shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Stores the project’s current generation state, feature set, requirements, architectural notes, and known issues for the TCEA Scream Park website.
